contentHtml:
Atlanta Transportation Form

Please use this form if you want camp-provided transportation to Atlanta during Intersession.

Host Family Interest Form

Please use this form (and the Atlanta Transportation Form) if you are interested in staying with a host family in Atlanta during Intersession.

Staying In Camp Form

Any Unit Staff or Specialists who would like to remain in camp for any part of intersession (between 5:30PM on Thursday and 5:00 PM on Saturday) must complete this form and indicate which meals they intend to eat in the dining hall.
contentText:
Atlanta Transportation Form

Please use this form if you want camp-provided transportation to Atlanta during Intersession.

Host Family Interest Form

Please use this form (and the Atlanta Transportation Form) if you are interested in staying with a host family in Atlanta during Intersession.

Staying In Camp Form

Any Unit Staff or Specialists who would like to remain in camp for any part of intersession (between 5:30PM on Thursday and 5:00 PM on Saturday) must complete this form and indicate which meals they intend to eat in the dining hall.
